description: A two-column biography block featuring a headshot photograph on the left and biographical text with a LinkedIn CTA on the right. Used on leadership profile pages.

FR-01.title: Headshot Image
FR-01.description: The block MUST display a professional headshot photograph on the left.
acceptance: Occupies ~30% of block width on desktop

FR-02.title: Person Name
FR-02.description: The block MUST display the person's name as the page H1 heading (positioned above the bio block, typically in the hero section).
acceptance: H1 heading, F37 Lineca Medium, 64px desktop

FR-03.title: Title/Role
FR-03.description: The block MUST display the person's title and role as a subtitle.
acceptance: E.g., 'Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer'

FR-04.title: Biography Text
FR-04.description: The block MUST display multiple paragraphs of biographical text.

FR-05.title: LinkedIn CTA
FR-05.description: The block SHOULD include a LinkedIn profile link.
acceptance: Links to the person's LinkedIn profile URL

FR-06.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-06.description: The block MUST stack vertically on mobile.
acceptance: Mobile: Image on top (full-width), text below
Image resizes to full width on mobile

accessibility.AC-01: Headshot image MUST have descriptive alt text including the person's name
accessibility.AC-02: LinkedIn link MUST indicate it opens in a new window
accessibility.AC-03: Text MUST be readable and properly structured
